title: ActionEnvelope
description: The bounded set of actions PlantLens may RECOMMEND per situation, with role gating, blocking conditions, and isolation/safety notes. PlantLens never controls hardware; for the PLC bridge these become REQUESTS the PLC accepts/denies. Authored as YAML (action_envelope.yaml) but this schema describes the parsed shape.

action_code.description: Numeric code for the PLC advisory bridge (RECOMMENDED_ACTION_CODE).

label.description: Operator-facing label, e.g. 'Inspect shaft load, coupling, and bearing drag'.

situation_ids.description: Situation types this action applies to; must be real situation types.

requires_isolation.description: If true, the Calm Card shows a 'requires isolation / safe procedure' warning.

blocked_if.description: Alarm ids that block this action while active (e.g. RESTART_INVERTER blocked_if MOTOR_TEMP_HIGH).

target_asset_id.description: For PLC-bridge requests: which asset the action targets.

plc_permission_required.description: If true, this becomes a PLC handshake request, never a direct write.
